last_substantive_baseline.title: Repin live publication to planner run 29979955391
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: This baseline proves the merged execution workflow is pinned to verified planner run 29979955391. It does not prove current price, quota, policy, effective role-assignment write permission, execution dispatch, deployment, managed-identity publication, Blob response, browser rendering, or a committed live frontend source.

repository_observation.head_semantics: PR #44 merge commit observed before opening the publication predeployment-readiness pull request
repository_observation.claim_boundary: This is a time-bounded observation. Resolve the live main head, PR state, reviews, CI, workflow runs, and Azure reality whenever this file is read.

authored_change.write_owner: This ChatGPT conversation — bounded repository-only predeployment-readiness PR explicitly authorized by Anthony Edgar with 'Proceed with predeployment-readiness PR'
authored_change.scope: Add a manually dispatched read-only readiness workflow, deterministic evidence assessor, regression tests, runbook, and reconciled project state. The workflow may later capture current CAD retail prices, regional Storage quota, applicable policy and deny assignments, current collector identity, execution-principal RBAC declarations, Provider validation, and exact Provider and ProviderNoRbac What-If. This repository increment does not authenticate to Azure, dispatch a workflow, grant permissions, deploy resources, invoke VM Run Command, publish a report, or change frontend source.
verification_criteria: readiness workflow is manual and protected by exact reviewed-commit checkout and typed READINESS-PUBLICATION confirmation
workflow pins planner run 29979955391, commit c3a17f8765fc7b9e43ef5f92a490ee43246ef35e, and artifact digest cb2b3ec7f9563d376e0ac4bae4e089af03a506ee272573445bf6510b946712bc
workflow and assessor contain no deployment create, RBAC mutation, Storage mutation, VM Run Command, quota update, policy mutation, or deletion command
assessor captures the complete CAD Storage retail-price response and digest and computes an explicit conservative estimate or fails cost readiness closed
assessor captures subscription-specific westus2 StorageAccounts current usage and limit

assessor captures applicable policy assignments, deny assignments, current collector identity, execution-principal role declarations, Provider validation, and exact four-create Provider and ProviderNoRbac What-If evidence
publisher guest preflight is explicitly deferred because VM Run Command is outside the read-only workflow
readiness output preserves deployment_authorized false and azure_mutations_performed false
project validation, all unit tests, and Bicep lint/build pass on the exact PR head
the final PR diff remains limited to the six declared paths
authored_change.failure_behavior: Keep the readiness PR draft, inspect the exact validation, test, or review finding, patch only the six declared paths, and do not dispatch workflows, authenticate to Azure, grant permissions, invoke guest commands, or mutate resources.
authored_change.rollback: Close the readiness PR without merge or revert its repository-only commits. No Azure, runtime, RBAC, Storage, policy, quota, VM, publication, or frontend rollback applies because this increment performs no external mutation.

bounded_authority_grants.authorization_source: Explicit user instruction after the read-only Azure planning boundary was stated
bounded_authority_grants.claim_boundary: This grant authorizes Azure reads and ProviderNoRbac planning only. It does not authorize the publication execution workflow, the proposed readiness workflow, deployment, RBAC changes, report publication, endpoint configuration, guest commands, or any Azure mutation.

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This planner evidence is current for the merged execution-workflow commit c3a17f8765fc7b9e43ef5f92a490ee43246ef35e and unchanged Bicep through main commit e77d5e9c59537a6cd0ad05858565b2a51942e278. pr41_publication_execution_promotion.claim_boundary: Repository promotion is merged. No publication workflow execution, Azure deployment, RBAC mutation, managed-identity publication, Blob/browser proof, or manual repair is established.

pr44_publication_planner_repin.claim_boundary: Current planner evidence is machine-pinned. No readiness workflow execution, publication workflow dispatch, Azure authentication for execution, permission grant, deployment, or browser proof is established.

publication_predeployment_readiness.claim_boundary: Read-only readiness workflow proposal only. Merge, dispatch, Azure authentication, evidence freshness, permissions, and Azure mutation remain separately unauthorized or unproven.

authority_defaults.rule: Defaults remain fail-closed. The merged execution workflow is repository state, not authority; the proposed readiness workflow has no dispatch or Azure-authentication grant; only the separate bounded read-only planner grant is active.

live_state_resolution.repository_head: Query the live GitHub default branch at read time.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query live PR head, draft state, mergeability, reviews, threads, and exact-head CI.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh authenticated Azure evidence; repository declarations and historical artifacts are insufficient.
